name: Spindrift Hollow
descriptionSeed: Here the chaos rides on TIME instead of matter — a hollow where moments don't queue politely. You'll meet someone before you're introduced, hear the end of a conversation first, wait an hour that costs a day or a day that costs an hour. The Hollow-folk have made a slow strange peace with it and speak in a grammar that assumes the listener already knows. What comes along with chaos here is the least obvious neighbor on the axis-map: space_time. No one would have guessed the next valley over from a trade-market would fold time.
encounterFlavor: Time out of joint — a warning that arrives after the danger, a debt paid before it's owed, an old woman who is also the child playing by the well, a moment you have to live twice to leave.
questSeeds: A Hollow-child keeps giving warnings about things that haven't happened; some come true and the town can't tell prophecy from memory — and neither can she
Someone came to the Hollow to un-live a single moment and has been trying for years; helping them means deciding whether that mercy is even possible here
A traveler is stuck in a repeating hour and doesn't know it; breaking the loop from outside is delicate, and the Hollow may not want them released
